sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9008" key="a)niereu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνῐερ-εύω</orth>, <sense id="n9008.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀνιερόω, τέμενος</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1498.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Men.Eph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
